discovery.note: How the left navigation exposes its two levels. If all topics are visible at once, list one seed page per group anyway.
discovery.groupSelector: how level-1 groups appear in the nav (accordions, sections, headings)
discovery.topicSelector: how level-2 topics appear under a group; note where the real slug comes from

extract.accessGatedSentinel: the exact text shown when content is paywalled/locked, or null if none
extract.tocLabel: the label above the right-hand table of contents (e.g. 'On This Page', 'Contents')
extract.relatedLabel: label for on-page related-links chips, or null
skip: anything not part of the article body
